nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 平均海拔
nodes.summary: 平均海拔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联25种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Andean guan、鳳冠孔雀雉等25种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Phylloscopus
nodes.summary: Phylloscopus（Phylloscopus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联80种鸟类，如Western Bonelli's warbler、Eastern Bonelli's warbler、橙斑翅柳莺等80种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 海南省
nodes.summary: 海南省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括大黄冠啄木鸟、塔尾树鹊、灰蓝鹊等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 海南柳莺
nodes.summary: The Hainan leaf warbler or Hainan leaf-warbler (Phylloscopus hainanus) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Phylloscopidae. It is endemic to mountains of southern Hainan Island, China. Hainan leaf warbler inhabits primary, selectively logged, and secondary forest as well as scrub at elevations of 640–1,500 m (2,100–4,920 ft) above sea level. It might have previously inhabited also lowland forests, but very little of those remain. Although it can be locally common, the overall population is small (estimated at 1500–7000 mature individuals) and it is known from a small number of sites only. Moreover, it is threatened by habitat loss and fragmentation. It occurs in a number of protected areas. References External links Image
